info.name: FakeStore API – Full QA Test Suite
info.description:
Complete Postman test collection for FakeStoreAPI (https://fakestoreapi.com).

Generated from QA Test Case document.

Covers:
• Authentication API
• Products API
• Users API
• Carts API
• Response Validation & Security

Each request includes:
1. Status Code Testing
2. Response Time Testing
3. Response Body Testing
4. JSON Values Validation

Base URL: https://fakestoreapi.com
Total Requests: 105

item.name: 01 – Authentication API
item.description: 18 test cases covering login, JWT validation, negative/security scenarios for /auth/login endpoint.

item.name: [TC-AUTH-001] POST /auth/login – Valid Credentials Return 200 and JWT Token

exec: // TC-AUTH-001 | POST /auth/login – Valid Credentials Return 200 and JWT Token
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] Response time is under 2000ms", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] Response body is not empty", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] Response body contains 'token' key", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] Response body is valid JSON", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] token field exists and is a string", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] token is not empty", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] token has 3-part JWT structure", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-001] token is stored in environment variable", function () {

item.name: [TC-AUTH-002] POST /auth/login – Wrong Password Returns 401

exec: pm.test("[TC-AUTH-002] Response time is under 2000ms", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-002] Response body is not empty", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-002] Response body is not empty on 401", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-002] Response body is valid JSON", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-002] No token returned for wrong password", function () {

item.name: [TC-AUTH-003] POST /auth/login – Non-Existent Username Returns 401

exec: pm.test("[TC-AUTH-003] Response time is under 2000ms", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-003] Response body is not empty", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-003] Response body is valid JSON", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-003] No token in error response", function () {
try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.token).to.be.undefined; } catch(e) { pm.expect(true).to.be.true; }

item.name: [TC-AUTH-015] POST /auth/login – HTTPS Enforced

exec: pm.test("[TC-AUTH-015] Status code is 301 or 302 or 403 or 200", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-015] Response time is under 3000ms", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-015] Response body is not empty", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-015] Response body is valid JSON", function () {
pm.test("[TC-AUTH-015] No valid JWT returned over plain HTTP", function () {
try { const b = pm.response.json(); if(b && b.token) { pm.expect(pm.request.url.toString()).to.include('https'); } } catch(e) { pm.expect(true).to.be.true; }

pm.test("[TC-PRD-013] IDs are in ascending order", function () {
const ids = body.map(p=>p.id); const sorted = [...ids].sort((a,b)=>a-b); pm.expect(ids).to.eql(sorted);
